provenance.note: Order-intrinsic discriminator re-validated on sprinkled 1+1D (pass, recovers geometry) vs column-shuffle (block). Gate placed between the clusters. Transitive percolation (the dynamics under test) is NOT used in gate construction (P3 Section 3). Deterministic; re-running p3_dynamics --stage a at f4837c8 reproduces these. Do not edit after freezing.
